component.name: Administrator_listQueues
component.description: List the queues.

component.name: Administrator_queueExists
component.description: Check whether the queue exists.

component.name: Administrator_deleteTopic
component.description: Delete the topic with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_createRule
component.description: Create a rule with the given name or name and options.

component.name: Administrator_createTopic
component.description: Create a topic with the given name or name and options.

component.name: Administrator_updateQueue
component.description: Update the queue with the options.

component.name: Administrator_deleteSubscription
component.description: Delete the subscription with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_createSubscription
component.description: Create a subscription with the given name or name and options.

component.name: Administrator_updateSubscription
component.description: Update the subscription with the given options.

component.name: Administrator_listRules
component.description: List the rules.

component.name: Administrator_deleteRule
component.description: Delete the rule with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_getTopic
component.description: Get the topic with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_listTopics
component.description: List the topics.

component.name: Administrator_updateTopic
component.description: Update the topic with the given options.

component.name: Administrator_topicExists
component.description: Get the status of existance of a topic with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_subscriptionExists
component.description: Get the status of existance of a subscription with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_getRule
component.description: Get the rule with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_getQueue
component.description: Get the queue with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_listSubscriptions
component.description: List the subscriptions.

component.name: Administrator_createQueue
component.description: Create a queue with the given name or name and options.

component.name: Administrator_getSubscription
component.description: Get the subscription with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_deleteQueue
component.description: Delete the queue with the given name.

component.name: Administrator_updateRule
component.description: Update the rule with the options.
